007.title: execute_task returns inside _merge_lock causing lock held during cost recording

hypotheses.claim: Control flow refactoring tasks involving locks and return statements produce prompts that are too complex for reliable Gemini CLI execution
evidence: task-007 failed with Gemini CLI exit code 1
task-007 involved restructuring a return inside _merge_lock
hypotheses.suggested_action: Orchestrator should use the result-variable pattern and keep lock-restructuring prompts under 3000 characters. If the task still fails, consider splitting into two sub-tasks.

hypotheses.claim: The executor.py file is the most frequently modified file and accumulates merge conflicts or complex state across sessions
evidence: task-007 (also executor.py) was the only failure
hypotheses.suggested_action: When multiple tasks target executor.py in the same session, prioritize ordering them to avoid overlapping function edits, and consider reducing parallelism for that file.
